name: TreeSaplings-Redux-PreOiled
title: Tree Saplings Redux PreOiled
author: Original by LukeM, Hacked to 1.1 by JustJinxed, RevivePatch by rocketridah, Redux by FuryoftheStars, Edit by GTrista
description:
A small mod that adds craftable saplings that grow into vanilla trees, and a way to farm them.

Based on the 'Redux' version. This one moves the production to not require Oil products.
